seoTitle: Enfield vs Enochs Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Enfield and Enochs Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Enfield vs Enochs Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Enfield and Enochs Point.
heading: Enfield vs Enochs Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Enfield, Victoria and Enochs Point, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Enochs Point has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Enfield (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Enfield or Enochs Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Enfield has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Enochs Point scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Enfield scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Enochs Point scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Enfield or Enochs Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Enochs Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
